pipeline_note: 142 → 47 → 27: 142 raw sliding-window hits before merge (epochs × Δt=1/2/5 yr); 47 union-merged overlapping groups (full historical); 27 greedy global_series on modern Δt=2 yr.
fdr_applicability: Benjamini–Hochberg on 142 correlated sliding-window tests is not applied as a discovery procedure — windows overlap strongly (M_eff << 142). Post-hoc BH on 47 merged-series Monte Carlo p-values is exploratory; does not correct the full search space.
